release_review.summary: Runtime Service snapshots now include an optional Runtime Gateway capability while preserving the existing compatibility window.
checked_surfaces: Runtime Service snapshot schema adds only the optional capabilities.runtime_gateway field and keeps protocol_version redeven-runtime-v1
Go snapshot normalization treats missing runtime_gateway as unsupported so older startup reports and health snapshots remain readable
Desktop shared Runtime Service normalization treats missing runtime_gateway as unsupported while preserving existing provider link and desktop model source capability behavior
Runtime Gateway catalog and open-session skeletons define credential-free wire contracts and do not connect Portal or Metaserver authorization
Desktop Welcome registry and tab UI are intentionally not wired in this slice; no existing open flow consumes runtime_gateway yet
Compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, and minimum Runtime version remain unchanged because this is an additive optional capability
release_review.same_window_rationale: The new runtime_gateway field is an additive optional capability under the existing Runtime Service snapshot envelope. Older runtimes omit it and new Desktop code normalizes the omission to unsupported; older Desktop versions ignore the extra JSON field from newer runtimes. No required field, protocol version, compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, or minimum Runtime version changes are needed for this skeleton.
